items.name: scheduler
items.title: Scheduler — full bundle
items.description: All 7 domain presets, grid and timeline engines. Copies all source files into components/scheduler/.

items.name: scheduler-roster
items.title: Scheduler — Workforce Roster
items.description: Shift scheduling with drag-and-drop, publish workflow, conflict detection. Day/week/month/year/list views.

items.name: scheduler-tv
items.title: Scheduler — TV / EPG Guide
items.description: TV programme guide. Channels as rows, programmes as blocks on a horizontal timeline.

items.name: scheduler-conference
items.title: Scheduler — Conference & Events
items.description: Multi-track conference scheduling. Rooms as rows, sessions as blocks.

items.name: scheduler-festival
items.title: Scheduler — Music Festival Lineup
items.description: Stage-by-stage festival scheduling on a horizontal timeline.

items.name: scheduler-healthcare
items.title: Scheduler — Healthcare Rota
items.description: Ward and staff rota with 24hr coverage and overnight shift support.

items.name: scheduler-gantt
items.title: Scheduler — Project Gantt
items.description: Project and sprint planning. Teams as rows, tasks as day-level blocks.

items.name: scheduler-venue
items.title: Scheduler — Venue Bookings
items.description: Room and space booking on a horizontal timeline.
